overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a cloaked character walking through a medieval village during light rain. The character moves along a stone path lined with wicker fences and red flowers, passing an NPC gardener tending to plants, with traditional wooden architecture and decorative string lights overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: village garden path with wicker fencing

events.description: NPC gardener becomes visible tending to flowers along the wicker fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path between a stone wall and a wicker fence with red flowers

notable_agents.action: tending to the red flowers along the wicker fence, facing away from the path

entered.detail: rough stone wall running along the left side of the path
woven wicker fence with dense red poppy flowers growing alongside
two-story timber-framed house with chimney and red awning
decorative string lights hanging across the path between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path in a medieval village during light rain. A stone wall runs along the left while a wicker fence with vibrant red flowers lines the right. Ahead, a timber-framed house with a chimney rises in the distance, and decorative string lights hang overhead. An NPC gardener becomes visible tending to the flowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with stone balustrade and red banners

events.description: wicker fence ends and stone balustrade begins on the left as character passes the gardener
red banners with golden sun symbols become visible hanging on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the gardener, moving alongside the stone balustrade

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade with rounded posts replacing the stone wall
vertical red banner with golden sun emblem hanging from a building

segments.scene_description: Having passed the gardener, the path continues with a stone balustrade on the left and dense red flowers on the right. The wicker fence gives way to open garden beds. Red banners with golden sun symbols hang from buildings on the right, and tall cypress trees become visible ahead as the character proceeds deeper into the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy medieval village, transitioning from a narrow residential path into a more open, decorated garden district. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path flanked by a stone wall and a wicker fence adorned with vibrant red flowers, while decorative string lights hang overhead. As the camera passes a gardener tending to the plants, the scene shifts toward a timber-framed house in the distance. The path then opens up, replacing the wicker fence with expansive garden beds and a stone balustrade on the left. Finally, the environment expands to reveal red banners with golden sun symbols hanging from the buildings before the camera proceeds toward tall cypress trees deeper within the village.
